item.title: Bulgaria, Slovenia, Romania, Croatia – EU Presidencies and Regional Dynamics
item.description: This episode covers the latest developments from Southeast Europe. Bulgaria navigates EU integration challenges, Slovenia focuses on economic resilience, Romania prepares for its 2026 Mediterranean presidency, and Croatia balances geopolitical ambitions with domestic concerns.

item.title: Germany, France, Belgium, Netherlands - France Opens Nuclear Deterrence to Europ...
item.description: France initiates a historic shift in nuclear doctrine, opening deterrence capabilities to European allies. Germany commits to Europe's strongest conventional army amid a Franco-German security pivot.

item.title: Poland, Latvia, Lithuania, Estonia - Poland Faces Russian Hybrid Onslaught Am...
item.description: Poland battles Russian hybrid warfare including sabotage and cyberattacks while Baltic states dramatically increase defense spending. Lithuania approves record 5.38% GDP defense budget.

item.title: Sweden, Denmark, Finland, Ireland - Sweden's 2026 Election: First Vote on NA...
item.description: Sweden's upcoming election marks the first vote since abandoning 200 years of military non-alignment. Denmark faces snap election amid Greenland sovereignty tensions. Finland proposes lifting nuclear weapons ban.

item.title: Bulgaria, Slovenia, Romania, Croatia - EU Defense Spending Surge: Eastern Membe...
item.description: Eastern EU members are dramatically increasing defense spending amid growing security concerns. Bulgaria, Slovenia, Romania, and Croatia accelerate military modernization efforts.

item.title: Germany, France, Belgium, Netherlands - Nuclear Deterrence & European Defense
item.description: France's shift to 'forward deterrence' and nuclear cooperation with European allies marks a historic break from Gaullist nuclear sovereignty. Germany commits to Europe's strongest conventional army amid a Franco-German security pivot.

item.title: Germany, France, Belgium, Netherlands - Nuclear Deterrence & European Defense
item.description: France opens nuclear deterrence to Europe in historic Cold War-scale realignment. Germany commits to Europe's strongest army amid Franco-German security pivot.

item.title: LATEST EPISODE Title 1
item.description: In this episode we discuss the latest developments across Europe.
